chapter_title: Toll Underpass or Tunnel in Certain Counties
text: A county may condemn a right-of-way or easement in real property necessary to construct an underpass, tunnel, or approach.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 282. Toll Underpass or Tunnel in Certain Counties
##### § 282.011 — Condemnation of Right-of-way or Easement

A county may condemn a right-of-way or easement in real property necessary to construct an underpass, tunnel, or approach.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A county may condemn a right-of-way or easement in real property necessary to construct an underpass, tunnel, or approach.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
